news-global-econ.title: WATCH: Mike Waltz tells Cuban delegation 'this is not Havana' during heated UN speech
news-global-econ.description: Mike Waltz fired back at the "act of war" claim at the United Nations General Assembly, blaming the communist regime for rolling blackouts and repression.

news-global-econ.title: Dems uphill climb for Senate majority just got a lot steeper with latest Platner allegation
news-global-econ.description: Graham Platner faces calls to quit the Maine Senate race amid a rape allegation, complicating Democrats' narrow path to recapturing the majority.

news-global-econ.title: Progressive Dems' full-throated Platner endorsements come back to haunt them after rape allegations
news-global-econ.description: Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, and "Pod Save America" hosts face scrutiny as their endorsements of Graham Platner resurface amid rape allegations.

news-global-econ.title: World Cup Round of 16 betting guide with Argentina, Colombia and the corners market leading the way
news-global-econ.description: Sports betting preview for the final day of the Round of 16 in the World Cup as Argentina looks to take on Egypt and Switzerland battles Colombia

news-global-econ.title: Graham Platner's chances of dropping out skyrocket to 94% after party revolt: Kalshi
news-global-econ.description: Prediction market Kalshi shows 94% probability that Graham Platner will drop out of the Maine Senate race as rape allegation rocks his campaign.

news-global-soc.title: President Zelensky Opens NATO Summit With Plea For Missiles and Alliance Membership
news-global-soc.description:
NATO would be wise to welcome Ukraine as a member of the alliance and should hurry to send more missiles to Kyiv, President Zelensky said.
The post President Zelensky Opens NATO Summit With Plea For Missiles and Alliance Membership appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: US claws back key concession to Iran after fresh attacks on commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
news-global-soc.description: Iran struck commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz days after President Donald Trump said he gave Tehran "a week off" during Khamenei's funeral ceremonies.

news-global-soc.title: Iran attacks ships in Strait of Hormuz days after Trump gave Tehran 'a week off' for Khamenei funeral
news-global-soc.description: Iran struck commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz days after President Donald Trump said he gave Tehran "a week off" during Khamenei's funeral ceremonies.

news-global-soc.title: French court clears path for conservative presidential candidate, but house arrest threatens campaign
news-global-soc.description: Marine Le Pen's embezzlement ban was shortened to allow a 2027 presidential run, but she must wear an ankle monitor that could complicate campaigning.

news-global-soc.title: Michael Rapaport owns up to getting Trump wrong after years of bashing him
news-global-soc.description: Michael Rapaport reveals how the Hamas hostage crisis shifted his views on Trump and why he's stopped insulting the president.
